channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Padres owner's widow says team would have signed Roki Sasaki if she was involved, amid succession lawsuit
item.description: The widow of the late San Diego Padres owner has provided a statement to Fox News Digital responding to claims her lawsuit hurt the team's chances of signing Roki Sasaki.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Caitlin Clark's foundation awards grants to 4 Iowa charities days before Hawkeyes retire her No. 22
item.description: Basketball star Caitlin Clark has awarded $22,000 grants through her foundation to four Iowa charities that she said inspired her during her time at the University of Iowa.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Where could the NFL hold an international Super Bowl? The pros and cons of potential hosts
item.description: LONDON (AP) — It’s a question Roger Goodell gets when he’s in London: Would the NFL stage a Super Bowl internationally? The usual answer is that America’s biggest sporting event is reserved for cities that have NFL franchises. But as the commissioner noted in October, “ things change.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rick Pitino-coached St. John's completes the program's first unbeaten January since 1985
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Rick Pitino joked that senior guard Kadary Richmond was like a fine wine. “He keeps getting better with age,” Pitino quipped. “And he’s 35.” Even if he was 35 and not 23, Richmond still would not have been born the last time St. John's got through January without a loss.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Madsen leads Utes past Cincinnati, 69-66
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Gabe Madsen scored seven of his 18 points in the final two minutes, Keanu Dawes added 12 points and nine rebounds and Utah beat Cincinnati 69-66 on Tuesday night. Ezra Ausar scored 11 points for Utah.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jalen Hurts will try to become 4th starting QB to win a Super Bowl after losing in his debut
item.description: Jalen Hurts bucked decades of history just by getting back to the Super Bowl after losing his first trip there as a starting quarterback.
item.dc:creator: Josh Dubow, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Fruita boys win 2OT thriller at Montrose for first place in SWL, as Fruita girls dominate Red Hawks
item.description: One of the most highly anticipated games of the season, Montrose vs. Fruita, a battle of the top two teams in the Southwestern league, exceeded expectations.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Warriors to retire Andre Iguodala's No. 9 jersey
item.description: As Andre Iguodala moves around town in the Bay Area these days, he is regularly stopped by fans eager to praise him for how he carried himself while playing for the Golden State Warriors.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Brea scores 18 to lead No. 12 Kentucky past No. 8 Tennessee 78-73
item.description: KNOXVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Koby Brea scored 18 points to lead No. 12 Kentucky to a 78-73 victory over No. 8 Tennessee on Tuesday night. Jaxson Robinson added 17 points as the Wildcats (15-5, 4-3 Southeastern Conference) snapped a two-game skid.
item.dc:creator: AL LESAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Scottie Scheffler details his hand injury from making ravioli and is ready to get back to golf
item.description: Scottie Scheffler figures the injury to his hand that kept him out of golf for a month could have been worse.
item.dc:creator: Doug Ferguson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Bears hire Dennis Allen as defensive coordinator under new coach Ben Johnson
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. (AP) — The Chicago Bears have hired Dennis Allen as defensive coordinator and Declan Doyle as offensive coordinator under new coach Ben Johnson. Chicago also is keeping Richard Hightower as special teams coordinator as it looks to rebound after going 5-12 this season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: WNBA star Caitlin Clark details 'incredible' experience alongside Taylor Swift at Chiefs' playoff game
item.description: The Indiana Fever guard made headlines when she joined the pop star in one of Arrowhead Stadium's luxury suites during a playoff game earlier this month.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Watch: Inside how Super Bowl footballs are made
item.description: As soon as this year's Super Bowl matchup was set, workers at the Wilson Sporting Goods football factory jumped into action.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lillard, Antetokounmpo lead Bucks past Jazz
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Former Weber State star Damian Lillard and Giannis Antetokounmpo and Damian Lillard each scored 35 points to lead the Milwaukee Bucks to a 125-110 victory over the Utah Jazz on Monday night. Utah has now lost six straight games, falling to 10-34 on the season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NASCAR Chicago Street Race tickets go on sale Monday
item.description: CHICAGO — Tickets for the NASCAR Chicago Street Race go on sale to the public Monday. The third edition of Chicago Street Race Weekend will be back downtown from July 5-6, capping off the Fourth of July holiday.
item.dc:creator: Marisa Rodriguez, WGN 9

item.title: Mahomes and the Chiefs will face Hurts, Barkley and the Eagles as they seek a Super Bowl three-peat
item.description: Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce and the Kansas City Chiefs are going for a three-peat in a Super Bowl rematch.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 25-year-old San Diego native pursuing pro golf dreams at Farmers Invitational
item.description: The Farmer's Insurance Invitational, presented by the Advocates Professional Golf Association (APGA) Tour, is taking place on the North Course at Torrey Pines, showcasing the next generation of professional golfers and supporting minority players who dream of joining the PGA Tour.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, Fox 5

item.title: Harris English holds off Sam Stevens by a shot in the Farmers Insurance Open at Torrey Pines
item.description: Harris English held off hard-charging Sam Stevens to win the Farmers Insurance Open by one shot, securing his fifth career PGA Tour victory with a 1-over 73 in challenging weather.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kneepkens scores 32 as Utes hold off BYU, 81-76
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The last time Gianna Kneepkens played against BYU, she suffered a season-ending knee injury in December of 2023. This time around, Kneepkens had one of the best days of her career.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Winnipeg hat trick sinks Utah HC, 5-2
item.description: WINNIPEG (AP) - Three goals ended Utah's three-game winning streak. Cole Perfetti scored his first NHL hat trick, including the go-ahead goal, for the Winnipeg Jets in a 5-2 win against the Utah Hockey Club at Canada Life Centre on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jaguars hire Bucs OC Liam Coen as head coach after making necessary moves
item.description: JACKSONVILLE, Fla. (AP) — The Jacksonville Jaguars hired Tampa Bay offensive coordinator Liam Coen as the eighth head coach in franchise history Friday, capping a covert operation that included owner Shad Khan moving on from general manager Trent Baalke and Coen reversing course with the Buccaneers.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Legendary former USC football coach will reportedly return to the NFL
item.description: A former National Championship-winning coach for the University of Southern California is taking his talents back to the NFL.
item.dc:creator: KTLA 5

item.title: LeBron James picked for 21st straight All-Star Game, extending NBA record
item.description: LeBron James is extending his All-Star records. And Giannis Antetokounmpo is the people’s choice, again. The NBA revealed the starters — some of them, anyway — for the revamped All-Star Game on Thursday night, and there wasn't much in the way of surprises.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Gilgeous-Alexander torches Jazz for career-high 54
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In a matchup between the Western Conference's best and worst teams, the Utah Jazz (10-32) gave the Oklahoma City Thunder (36-7) quite a scare on their home court.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
